Your Name

MSc Computer Science · Software Engineer

I build reliable, well-crafted software. Currently finishing my MSc in Computer Science with a focus on distributed systems and software engineering.

CV Projects GitHub LinkedIn Download CV (PDF)

Focus Areas

Software Engineering

Writing clean, maintainable code. Designing modular architectures, establishing testing practices, and building developer tooling that teams enjoy using.

Distributed Systems

Consensus protocols, fault-tolerant design, scalable cloud infrastructure, and edge computing. Turning research ideas into working systems.

Applied Projects

End-to-end delivery from idea to deployment. Collaborating across teams, bridging research and production, and building things that work in practice.
